{"title": "What Love Stories Get Wrong About Longing", "description": "It's not about being adored. It's about watching them light up for someone else and feeling that ache — the one that wants your worlds to collapse into one. That's the fantasy nobody writes about. #Poetry #Shorts #LovePoetry", "tags": ["poetry shorts", "love poem", "emotional poetry", "longing and love", "poetry analysis", "quotes about love", "poetry for introverts"]}
